title: May 18
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 18''' is the 138th day of the year (139th in leap years). There are 227 days remaining.</noinclude>

*[[1950s#1953|1953]] – [[Alan Kupperberg]] is born.
*[[1981]] – ''[[Star Wars (radio)|Star Wars]]:'' "[[The Case for Rebellion]]" aired on [[National Public Radio]].
*[[1982]] – [[Star Wars (1977) 62|''Star Wars'' (1977) 62]] released.
*[[1985]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 100|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 100]] published.
*[[1999]] – [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace (video game)|''Star Wars'': Episode I ''The Phantom Menace'' video game]] released on the [[Wikipedia:Personal computer|PC]] platform.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars Insider 54|''Star Wars Insider'' 54]] released for subscribers.
*[[2004]] – ''[[The Hive]]'' eBook published.
*2004 – [[Star Wars Insider 76|''Star Wars Insider'' 76]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Empire 31|''Empire'' 31]] published.
*2005 – [[Obsession 5|''Obsession'' 5]] published.
*[[2009]] – [[Hala Finley]] is born.
*[[2011]] – [[Star Wars: Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett (TPB)|''Star Wars: Blood Ties: A Tale of Jango and Boba Fett'' trade paperback]] published.
*2011 – [[Jedi—The Dark Side 1|''Jedi—The Dark Side'' 1]] published.
*2011 – ''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Volume 2: Threat of Peace]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – [[Star Wars Rebels Magazine 18|''Star Wars Rebels'' Magazine 18]] published in the United Kingdom.
*[[2021]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Mandalorian: Guide to Season One]]'' published.
*[[2022]] – [[Doctor Aphra (2020) 20|''Doctor Aphra'' (2020) 20]] published.
*2022 – [[Han Solo & Chewbacca 2|''Han Solo & Chewbacca'' 2]] published.
*2022 – ''[[The Mandalorian – The Graphic Novel of Season 1]]'' published in the UK.
*[[2023]] – [[The Walt Disney Company|Disney]] announces that [[Star Wars: Galactic Starcruiser|''Star Wars'': Galactic Starcruiser]] will close in [[September]] of that year.
*[[2024]] – [[Fred Roos]] dies.
<noinclude>
